evals.expected_output: Normalizes the branch name by prefixing with the user's username (e.g. luan.santos/fix-auth-timeout), creates the branch via Skill(gt:gt, 'create luan.santos/fix-auth-timeout'), and updates task 42 to in_progress with the branch name in metadata.
expectations: Prefixes branch name with username from GIT_USERNAME or whoami
Uses Skill(gt:gt, 'create ...') because gt plugin is loaded, not git checkout -b
Updates task 42 with status in_progress and metadata.branch set to the full branch name

evals.prompt: /start fix-auth-timeout — no gt, and git checkout -b fails because the branch already exists
evals.expected_output: Attempts git checkout -b with the normalized name, detects the 'branch already exists' error, checks git branch -a for similar names, and suggests an alternate name to the user.
expectations: Recognizes the 'branch already exists' error rather than silently failing
Checks existing branches and suggests an alternate name

evals.prompt: /start add-notifications --auto — no gt, no task id
evals.expected_output: Creates branch via git checkout -b with normalized name, then auto-creates a task (type: feat inferred from 'add-' prefix, P2 priority) without asking, links it to the branch, and suggests /scope or /develop.
expectations: Creates a task automatically because --auto was specified, without asking the user
Infers task type as feat from the branch name
Sets task status to in_progress with the branch in metadata
